title: Officially, Marco Rubio is still banned from China. So how is he in Beijing?
description: Chinese officials are using a different transliterated character for the secretary of state's name, perhaps to allow him to visit without lifting a 2020 ban.

title: Xi warns Trump that mishandling Taiwan could spark ‘conflicts’
description: China’s leader made clear his top priority is the fate of the contested island and its U.S. military support, a striking move given President Donald Trump’s effort to mend ties and deliver trade deals.

title: Voters are caught in the middle as the redistricting battle intensifies
description: Much of the focus of the ongoing redistricting war has been on which political party will come out on top. But it's voters who will pay a cost, say voting experts and voting rights advocates.

title: Takeaways from Nebraska Democratic primaries filled with plot twists
description: Democrats knew they couldn’t unseat a GOP senator, so they backed an independent and fielded a candidate who promised to drop out if she won. Then it got complicated.

title: A look at Trump's goals for his summit in China
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks John Moolenaar, chairman of the House Select Committee on China, about President Trump's goals for his summit in Beijing.

title: Denise Powell wins Democratic primary for Nebraska's 2nd congressional district
description: Political organizer Denise Powell has defeated State Sen. John Cavanaugh to win the Democratic primary in the closely watched race for Nebraska's second congressional district.

title: The gerrymandering wars are here to stay
description: What happens next

title: White House to host 9-hour prayer festival focused on Christian roots of U.S.
description: Pete Hegseth, Marco Rubio and Mike Johnson will speak at the event, which centers on the idea that the founders wanted the U.S. to be explicitly Christian.

title: What Tennessee's new redistricting map looks like from the ground
description: In Memphis, new congressional maps have split the city's single congressional district, held by a Democrat, into three that are likely to elect Republicans in November.

title: Facing headwinds at home, Trump signals eagerness to make deals at China summit
description: Under pressure from Beijing, the president has indicated an openness to rethinking U.S. support for Taiwan, alarming its backers.

title: Unusual flood of money from a veterans group roils Iowa Senate primary
description: VoteVets is spending millions to boost a Paralympic gold medalist over a state senator who's seen as more liberal in a race that Democrats say they have a shot to win.

title: How the Trump administration has undermined the fight against public corruption
description: At least 15 former elected officials and co-conspirators with corruption offenses have been pardoned by President Trump in the last year, undermining the fight against public corruption.

title: Is the U.S. slipping into 'Competitive Authoritarianism?'
description: What form of government do we have in America now? Some scholars say it is no longer liberal democracy, but "competitive authoritarianism." NPR's Frank Langfitt explains the term and its origin.

title: Lawmakers question Pete Hegseth about rising cost of U.S. war against Iran
description: Lawmakers are pressing Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth about the growing cost of the war against Iran and the administration's plans to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Rep. Rosa DeLauro, D-Conn., on the cost of the war in Iran
description: NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with Democratic Rep. Rosa DeLauro of Connecticut about Pentagon spending on the U.S. war against Iran.

title: Powell pulls ahead in tight race for Nebraska's 2nd District
description: Denise Powell pulled ahead Tuesday night in a close race with John Cavanaugh in Tuesday's 2nd Congressional District primary in

title: Kash Patel lashes out as lawmakers question ‘excessive drinking’
description: The FBI director offered a brash defense to questions centering on a recent news report alleging that his “excessive drinking” impaired his ability to do the job.

title: Former private prison official to serve as acting ICE chief
description: Compared to the start of President Trump's second term, David Venturella takes over an agency with a larger workforce, more financial resources — and also a continued funding lapse.

title: Why the Iran war is hurting the economy
description: There isn’t much Congress or Trump can do about it, experts warn

title: Hegseth, Caine encounter intense bipartisan frustration with Iran war
description: As a ceasefire with Tehran falters, Republicans joined Democrats in pressing for details on the conflict’s costs and the administration’s plan to end it.

title: Trump shares post calling for Obama’s arrest
description: The repost on social media was among a flurry of late-night posts in which President Donald Trump railed against his political opponents.

title: Justice Dept. charges shipping company in deadly Key Bridge collapse
description: Prosecutors accused the Singapore-based company and subsidiaries of fostering unsafe conditions that caused the Dali cargo ship to crash into the Baltimore bridge in 2024.
